steps.title: Classify the next sentence
steps.content: The previous sentence says not all conifers are evergreen. The sentence about larch trees losing their needles every fall gives a specific example of that exception.

steps.title: Use an example transition
steps.content: The transition must signal that larch trees illustrate the preceding claim. B would signal contrast, C would suggest simultaneous or parallel action, and D would present a merely additional fact instead of an example. The answer is A.
